package.name: welding_finetune_skill
package.description:
Mock implementation of the "fine-tune model" skill. Lifecycle action server triggered by the FINE_TUNE_MODEL intent (ROBIN dashboard "Fine-tune" button). Mock: 4 s with COLLECTING → UPLOADING → QUEUED phase feedback. Returns a stub sample count; in production replace with calls to the ROBIN ML pipeline to collect and submit telemetry for retraining.
ros4hri compliance: conceptually implements ml_skills/FineTuneModel.
